creator: kredaxx@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to johans from comment #13)

Hi.

No I have not noticed any such problems:

Dell PowerEdge R610 Hyper-Threading off.
FreeBSD freebsd-lms 10.1-STABLE FreeBSD 10.1-STABLE #4 r279781M: (Around 250K states in peak times and 750Mb/s, about 1700 users)

- Uptime 11 days. (Had to reboot it once for maintenence. (But was previously working for 11 days with the patch).

Dell T3400 Hyper-Threading off.
FreeBSD freebsd-zew 10.1-RELEASE-p5 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p5 (Around 30K states in peak times, 40Mb/s, a handful of users)

- Uptime 22 days with the patch.

I will of course report if anything serious like a crash would occur.
